Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: Full name, required for all contacts in the Do Not Contact list.
U-M UniqName (user id), or email address for non-UM contacts.
Field.Name: UniqName
Field.Title: UniqName

Validation.Message: Enter the UniqName only, without @umich.edu or @med.michigan.edu.

Field.Description: Preferred email address. Only needed for External Contacts or to manually override an @umich.edu address.
Field.Name: PreferredEmail
Field.Title: Preferred Email (Override)

Validation.Message: Please enter a valid email address.

Field.Description: Email address, which defaults to the user's U-M level 1 email (@umich.edu) unless overridden by the Preferred Email field.
Field.Name: Email

Field.Description: The specific type of communication for which this contact requested to not be contacted.
Field.Name: Channels
Field.Title: Channels

Field.Description: (Automatic) The record in the People list that corresponds to this entry, to facilitate reporting.
Field.Name: LinkedPeople
TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.
